shellCommands.command: pwd && rg -n "function parseDate|parseDate" src/date_utils.ts src/test/date_utils_test.test.ts package.json
grep -n -A45 -B15 'function parseDate\|export.*parseDate' src/date_utils.ts; grep -n -A25 -B10 'parseDate' src/test/date_utils_test.test.ts | head -240
cat package.json | sed -n '1,180p'; find src -maxdepth 3 -type f | sort | head -80

node_modules/.bin/jest src/test/date_utils_test.test.ts --runInBand -t 'parse date that matches|prefer the first matching|does not match the format|does not match any of the formats|without strict parsing'
git status --short && git diff --stat && git diff --check
